title: PayloadFrame (transport envelope)
description: Physical Socket.IO envelope for application events. Logical JSON-RPC lives inside payload after decode/decompress. Receivers must use enc and cmp on each frame; cmp is always gzip or none on the wire (emitter auto mode is not a third cmp value). The runtime accepts payload as raw bytes or as a base64 string representation in JSON serialization.

cmp.description: Compression applied to the encoded logical bytes

originalSize.description: Byte length of logical payload before compression

compressedSize.description: Byte length of the payload field on the wire

payload.description: Wire bytes: UTF-8 JSON when cmp is none, or gzip of those bytes when cmp is gzip. In JSON serialization this may appear as an array of byte values (0-255), a platform binary object (for example Buffer), or a base64 string.

oneOf.description: Base64 representation accepted by the current runtime for JSON-serialized frames
